source.section_heading: Fee Table: Other fees for using PayPal Online Card Payment Services

normalized_cells: Credit Card and Debit Card Confirmation(s)

Some users, in order to increase their sending limit or as PayPal may determine, may be charged a Credit Card and Debit Card Link and Confirmation fee. This amount will be refunded when you successfully complete the credit card or debit card verification process.
See Credit Card and Debit Card Link and Confirmation Table below.

normalized_cells: This fee will apply for requests of information relating to why we had reasonable justification to refuse your payment order. We will not charge you for records requested in connection with your good-faith assertion of an error in your PayPal account.
